content_body:
We've all been there: You made tons of wonderful plans for your winter vacation, but a snowstorm has put all of those plans on hold. But that doesn't mean you have to put fun with family and friends on hold. There are plenty of ways to make the most of being snowed in. Check out seven of our favorite ideas below!

1. Games

The obvious choice, board games are the perfect way to have fun when you're stuck indoors. Forgot to bring your collection? Simple games like Charades and Telephone don't require anything but you and your loved ones!

2. Play Dress Up

Have a contest to see who can put together the best—or craziest—outfit! Anything goes: from towels to bedsheets. Just be sure to take lots of photos!

3. Dance Party

Few things bring people together like music that gets your feet moving, and websites like Songza and Youtube let you crank up the tunes easily. Blast your one-hit-wonders and crowd pleasers and get the party started. All it takes is a computer!

4. Cook Together

If you find yourself stuck indoors, why not take the time to test out that recipe you've been wanting to try? Delegate the tasks so everyone can help—and enjoy the fruits of your labor after the fact. Heating up the kitchen is a great way to fight the cold outside!

5. Revive Your Inner Artist

No one said you have to be the next Picasso, but drawing together is a fun way to connect. Arrange fruit, flowers, etc. for a still life, or try your hand at drawing each other. For extra fun, challenge yourselves to do quick sketches without looking at the paper. The results are sure to get some laughs!

6. Meditate

There is plenty of research that lists the benefits of meditation. The problem is just finding time to do it. If you find yourself with unexpected time on your hands after a snowstorm, why not use that time to relax? Who knows—you might just find yourself wishing for more snow!

7. Play Outside

The snow may have stopped you from traveling anywhere, but that doesn't mean you have to be stuck in the house. Head out into the snow to make snow angels, snowmen, and even snow forts. Let's not forget the timeless classic: snowball fights!
title: 7 Fun Ways to Spend a Snow Day
